ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "ons_code" TEXT /* ONS (Office for National Statistics) code for the authority */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the authority */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the authority was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2006/07, 2007/08) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local authority */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "budget_amount" INTEGER /* Budget amount for the authority in that year */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES budget_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_breakdowns" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breakdown entry */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount allocated to the category */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the breakdown was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_breakdowns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_breakdowns_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., department staff, local government official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the budget */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
